title: BBQ Barbeque Bucket - Silver Galvanised - Includes: Bucket, Fuel Bowl & Grill with Handle.
features: Our BBQ Bucket is designed for those limited by space constraints or simply for those wanting the flexibility to enjoy alfresco cooking on the go. It is perfect for picnics, camping, festivals or beach trips.
This lightweight and portable BBQ is robust and designed to be used again and again. It is available in 2 colours, Silver or Black. Both styles feature a simple yet eye-catching BBQ wording design.

Our BBQ bucket is made from galvanised steel with removable metal handle and large air holes for maximum air circulation. Also features a removable fuel bowl for coals or briquettes that is designed to prevent heat escaping to the outer casing.
This set includes: barbeque bucket, metal cooking grill, fuel bowl and grill handle. For safety you advised to remove main bucket handle whilst in use.
description: Outdoor BBQ Barbeque Bucket - Galvanised Design available in Black or Silver - Includes: Bucket, Fuel Bowl & Grill with Handle - 27cm (H) x 28cm (Dia) Our BBQ Bucket is designed for those limited by space constraints or simply for those wanting the flexibility to enjoy alfresco cooking on the go.
